name: Jitsi
description: Jitsi — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Video Conferencing.

seo.title: Jitsi Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Jitsi analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Jitsi is a Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure tool.
pros: Managed pub/sub infrastructure removes server ops burden
review.best_for: Apps with live features: chat, collaboration, gaming
review.not_for: Purely request-response apps with no real-time needs
